# thoth_browser_enrollments (Data Source)

Reads browser enrollments with optional provider and status filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `provider` (String) Optional browser provider filter.
- `status` (String) Optional enrollment status filter.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Browser enrollment rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total enrollments returned.
